jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
